# NEON ARCADE

> Play 62 free online browser games instantly — no download, no login required. Arcade, puzzle, skill and retro games with global leaderboards.

NEON ARCADE is a collection of 62 free HTML5 browser games organized in four categories:

## Categories

- [NEON ARCADE](https://neonarcade.net/neonarcade/) — 31 quick viral action games (30-60 seconds)
- [NEON MIND](https://neonarcade.net/neonmind/) — 15 classic brain puzzles (Sudoku, Minesweeper, Queens, etc.)
- [NEON GRIND](https://neonarcade.net/neongrind/) — 8 progressive skill challenges
- [NEON CLASSIC](https://neonarcade.net/neonclassic/) — 8 retro arcade classics reimagined

## All Games

### NEON ARCADE
- [Battleship](https://neonarcade.net/neonarcade/battleship.html) — Classic naval warfare with smart AI and online 2-player multiplayer
- [Afterglow](https://neonarcade.net/neonarcade/afterglow.html) — Navigate through fading trails of light
- [Bloomfield](https://neonarcade.net/neonarcade/bloomfield.html) — Grow flowers in a neon garden
- [Breakout Architect](https://neonarcade.net/neonarcade/breakout-architect.html) — Design levels, challenge friends
- [Burndown](https://neonarcade.net/neonarcade/burndown.html) — Speedrun tower of micro-tasks
- [Catalyst](https://neonarcade.net/neonarcade/catalyst.html) — Chain reactions in a particle field
- [Chimp Test](https://neonarcade.net/neonarcade/chimp.html) — Memory sequence challenge
- [Chromaself](https://neonarcade.net/neonarcade/chromaself.html) — Color personality quiz game
- [Curfew](https://neonarcade.net/neonarcade/curfew.html) — Stealth avoidance under time pressure
- [Doodle Drop](https://neonarcade.net/neonarcade/doodle-drop.html) — Draw platforms while falling
- [Faultline](https://neonarcade.net/neonarcade/faultline.html) — Find the shifted pixel row
- [Flappy Rewind](https://neonarcade.net/neonarcade/flappy-rewind.html) — Flappy Bird with time rewind
- [Gridlock](https://neonarcade.net/neonarcade/gridlock.html) — Slide blocks to solve the puzzle
- [Impostor Pixel](https://neonarcade.net/neonarcade/impostor-pixel.html) — Spot the different tile
- [Mine Finder](https://neonarcade.net/neonarcade/mine-finder.html) — Reverse Minesweeper vs AI
- [Neon Snake](https://neonarcade.net/neonarcade/neon-snake.html) — Classic snake with risk vs reward
- [Pac-Man Amnesia](https://neonarcade.net/neonarcade/pacman-amnesia.html) — Pac-Man but the maze fades
- [Palette](https://neonarcade.net/neonarcade/palette.html) — Match colors from memory
- [Pong Both Sides](https://neonarcade.net/neonarcade/pong-both-sides.html) — Control both paddles at once
- [Pour](https://neonarcade.net/neonarcade/pour.html) — Water sorting puzzle
- [Priorself](https://neonarcade.net/neonarcade/priorself.html) — Ghost-cooperation puzzle
- [Signal](https://neonarcade.net/neonarcade/signal.html) — Daily cipher puzzle
- [Split Second](https://neonarcade.net/neonarcade/split-second.html) — Reflex-based decision game
- [Territory](https://neonarcade.net/neonarcade/territory.html) — Daily grid strategy puzzle
- [Tetris Betrayal](https://neonarcade.net/neonarcade/tetris-betrayal.html) — Play Tetris badly on purpose
- [Truecolor](https://neonarcade.net/neonarcade/truecolor.html) — Test your color perception
- [TypeBlitz](https://neonarcade.net/neonarcade/typeblitz.html) — Speed typing challenge
- [Wordchain](https://neonarcade.net/neonarcade/wordchain.html) — Build word chains against the clock
- [Wordchain Duel](https://neonarcade.net/neonarcade/wordchain-duel.html) — Async 1v1 word chain challenge
- [Veto](https://neonarcade.net/neonarcade/veto.html) — 2-player bracket elimination challenge
- [Mimic](https://neonarcade.net/neonarcade/mimic.html) — Social prediction game with challenge links

### NEON MIND
- [Bridges](https://neonarcade.net/neonmind/bridges.html) — Connect islands with bridges
- [Kakuro](https://neonarcade.net/neonmind/kakuro.html) — Cross-sum number puzzle
- [Light Up](https://neonarcade.net/neonmind/lightup.html) — Place bulbs to illuminate the grid
- [Minesweeper](https://neonarcade.net/neonmind/minesweeper.html) — Six progressive grid sizes
- [MiniSudoku](https://neonarcade.net/neonmind/minisudoku.html) — Quick 6x6 Sudoku
- [Nonogram](https://neonarcade.net/neonmind/nonogram.html) — Pixel art logic puzzle
- [Nurikabe](https://neonarcade.net/neonmind/nurikabe.html) — Island-in-the-stream logic puzzle
- [Queens](https://neonarcade.net/neonmind/queens.html) — Place queens on colored regions
- [Skyscrapers](https://neonarcade.net/neonmind/skyscrapers.html) — Latin square with visibility clues
- [Sudoku](https://neonarcade.net/neonmind/sudoku.html) — 9x9 Sudoku with four difficulty levels
- [Tango](https://neonarcade.net/neonmind/tango.html) — Binary placement puzzle
- [Tents](https://neonarcade.net/neonmind/tents.html) — Place tents next to trees
- [Connections](https://neonarcade.net/neonmind/connections.html) — Find 4 groups of 4 words by hidden connection
- [Hitori](https://neonarcade.net/neonmind/hitori.html) — Shade cells to eliminate duplicates
- [KenKen](https://neonarcade.net/neonmind/kenken.html) — Math logic with arithmetic cages

### NEON GRIND
- [Click Speed](https://neonarcade.net/neongrind/clickspeed.html) — How fast can you click?
- [ColorName](https://neonarcade.net/neongrind/colorname.html) — Name the color, not the word
- [GridMatch](https://neonarcade.net/neongrind/gridmatch.html) — Spot the difference in growing grids
- [MathBlitz](https://neonarcade.net/neongrind/mathblitz.html) — Mental math speed challenge
- [NeuroSort](https://neonarcade.net/neongrind/neurosort.html) — Sort numbers under pressure
- [NumberSense](https://neonarcade.net/neongrind/numbersense.html) — Estimate quantities quickly
- [Reflex Chain](https://neonarcade.net/neongrind/reflex-chain.html) — Sequential reaction time test
- [Sequencer](https://neonarcade.net/neongrind/sequencer.html) — Simon Says pattern memory challenge

### NEON CLASSIC
- [Neon 2048](https://neonarcade.net/neonclassic/2048.html) — Slide and merge to 2048
- [Neon Asteroids](https://neonarcade.net/neonclassic/asteroids.html) — Destroy asteroids in neon space
- [Neon Breakout](https://neonarcade.net/neonclassic/breakout.html) — Smash neon bricks with combos
- [Neon Frogger](https://neonarcade.net/neonclassic/frogger.html) — Cross the road in neon traffic
- [Neon Invaders](https://neonarcade.net/neonclassic/invaders.html) — Defend against neon alien waves
- [Neon Pairs](https://neonarcade.net/neonclassic/pairs.html) — Memory card matching
- [Neon Tetris](https://neonarcade.net/neonclassic/tetris.html) — Classic block stacking reimagined
- [Tic Tac Toe](https://neonarcade.net/neonclassic/tictactoe.html) — 3x3 or 4x4, VS AI or VS Friend

## Features

- All games are free, no account required
- Every game runs in the browser (HTML5, no plugins)
- Mobile and desktop support with touch and keyboard controls
- ESC key quits to menu during gameplay
- Global leaderboards and score sharing
- Neon-retro visual style with dark theme

## Other Pages

- [Blog](https://neonarcade.net/blog.html) — Behind-the-scenes development articles
- [Updates](https://neonarcade.net/updates.html) — Changelog and release notes
